nodes.label: AI as writing efficiency tool

nodes.grounding_span: There are already methods in place on how I collect, store, process all that data

nodes.grounding_span: I find it much faster than my usual approach

nodes.label: Scientific accuracy and understanding
nodes.grounding_span: I have a fairly deep understanding of these topics so I have a feeling if something is being oversimplified

nodes.label: Intellectual enjoyment and engagement
nodes.grounding_span: These are typically the more interesting aspect of my work and I enjoy how I do them

nodes.label: Comprehensive literature knowledge
nodes.grounding_span: It can be hard to find papers as a junior researcher

nodes.label: Positive adoption of AI for writing tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I decided to use the AI as I find it much faster than my usual approach and the feedback I get on my outputted work has been positive

nodes.label: Cautious validation of AI outputs
nodes.grounding_span: Compare the results to textbooks. Also, I have a fairly deep understanding of these topics so I have a feeling if something is being oversimplified

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in core experimental work

nodes.grounding_span: Create deep literature reviews and recommend papers based on what I am reading
